title: Available GPU partition inventory
difficulty_justification: Simple lookup of available GPU partitions and node counts from topology — single tool call, no cross-source reasoning.
query_text: What GPU partitions are available on this cluster, how many nodes does each have, and what type of GPUs are they?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: One GPU partition is currently available: gpu_v100 — 16 nodes, each with 4× NVIDIA V100 32GB SXM2 GPUs (64 GPUs total). Note: an expansion with 8× NVIDIA H100 nodes is planned for 2026-Q3 but not yet available.

checkpoints.description: Agent reports 16 nodes with V100 GPUs.
